## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.51

### Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing for accounts where audio starts but video still does not render.
- Keeps camera viewing on the AlexxIT/WebRTC go2rtc-compatible raw H264 stream source.

### Debug Logging
- Tightens raw H264 stream debug context so follow-up logs are much shorter.
- Throttles repeated keyframe request debug lines while preserving packet, frame, queue, and close summaries.
